definition: A building where people live
sentence: They moved to a new house.

definition: A piece of furniture with a flat top
sentence: Put the plates on the table.

definition: A clear liquid essential for life
sentence: She filled the glass with cold water.

definition: Brightness that lets you see
sentence: The light from the sun warmed the room.

definition: Sounds arranged in a pleasing pattern
sentence: She played beautiful music on the piano.

definition: A thin sheet used for writing
sentence: He folded the paper into an airplane.

definition: A large stream of water that flows to the sea
sentence: The river flowed through the valley.

definition: A happy expression on the face
sentence: Her smile brightened everyone's day.

definition: A tall narrow building or structure
sentence: The tower reached high above the city.

definition: The color of grass and leaves
sentence: The green leaves rustled in the wind.

definition: An opening in a wall fitted with glass
sentence: She looked out the window at the garden.

definition: To go from one place to another
sentence: They love to travel to new countries.

definition: The power to do work or move
sentence: Solar panels turn sunlight into energy.

definition: A very dry area with little rain
sentence: The desert can be very hot during the day.

definition: Land surrounded by water
sentence: The island had beautiful sandy beaches.

definition: A game that tests your thinking
sentence: She solved the puzzle in ten minutes.

definition: A building used for worship
sentence: The ancient temple stood on top of the hill.

definition: A dark shape made when light is blocked
sentence: His shadow stretched across the sidewalk.

definition: The room where food is prepared
sentence: She baked cookies in the kitchen.

definition: Steady position or equal distribution
sentence: She kept her balance on the beam.

definition: A tool that shows direction
sentence: The compass pointed north through the forest.

definition: A clear mineral or glass-like solid
sentence: The crystal sparkled in the sunlight.

definition: An entrance or opening in a wall or fence
sentence: The gateway led to a beautiful garden.

definition: The gathering of crops
sentence: Farmers celebrate the autumn harvest.

definition: A repeated design or arrangement
sentence: The quilt had a colorful pattern.

definition: To speak very softly
sentence: She had to whisper in the library.

definition: A structure that carries smoke from a fire
sentence: Smoke rose from the chimney on the roof.

definition: A large reptile that lived millions of years ago
sentence: The museum has a dinosaur skeleton.

definition: The largest land animal with a trunk
sentence: The elephant sprayed water with its trunk.

definition: A winner or top competitor
sentence: She became the spelling champion of her school.

definition: To find something for the first time
sentence: Scientists discover new species every year.

definition: Twelve o'clock at night
sentence: The clock struck midnight on New Year's Eve.

definition: A raised flat surface to stand on
sentence: They waited for the train on the platform.

definition: Food placed between two slices of bread
sentence: He made a cheese sandwich for lunch.

definition: Valuable items like gold and jewels
sentence: The pirates searched for buried treasure.

definition: A folding cover that protects from rain
sentence: She opened her umbrella when it started raining.

definition: A period of rest from work or school
sentence: The family went on vacation to the beach.

definition: An exciting and unusual experience
sentence: They went on an adventure in the mountains.

definition: The study of the Earth and its features
sentence: In geography class we learned about rivers.

definition: An insect with large colorful wings
sentence: A butterfly landed on the flower.

definition: A person who investigates crimes
sentence: The detective searched for clues at the scene.

definition: The process of learning and gaining knowledge
sentence: Education helps people understand the world.

definition: Tables, chairs, and other movable items in a room
sentence: They bought new furniture for the living room.

definition: The back of a horse; riding a horse
sentence: She learned to ride horseback at the ranch.

definition: Something new that is created
sentence: The telephone was an amazing invention.

definition: A wide view of natural scenery
sentence: The landscape was filled with rolling hills.

definition: A spoken or written account of events
sentence: The book tells a thrilling narrative.

definition: Very pleasing to look at or hear
sentence: The sunset was beautiful.

definition: Likely to cause harm or injury
sentence: Swimming in the stormy sea is dangerous.

definition: Extremely good or outstanding
sentence: She did an excellent job on her project.

definition: A promise that something will happen
sentence: The store offers a money-back guarantee.

definition: A powerful tropical storm with strong winds
sentence: The hurricane brought heavy rain and wind.

definition: Existing only in the mind; not real
sentence: The child had an imaginary friend.

definition: Facts and skills learned through experience
sentence: Reading builds knowledge about many topics.

definition: Needed or required
sentence: Water is necessary for all living things.

definition: A complicated maze or network of paths
sentence: They got lost in the garden labyrinth.

definition: Inspiring delight or admiration
sentence: The fireworks show was truly wonderful.

definition: A special event to mark an occasion
sentence: The birthday celebration was fun.

definition: How hot or cold something is
sentence: The temperature dropped below zero.

definition: To successfully complete a task
sentence: She worked hard to accomplish her goal.

definition: A unit of length equal to one hundredth of a meter
sentence: The bug was only one centimeter long.

definition: A formal meeting for discussion
sentence: Scientists gathered at the conference to share ideas.

definition: A test done to discover something new
sentence: The science experiment created colorful bubbles.

definition: All people born around the same time
sentence: Each generation brings new ideas to the world.

definition: A person or animal that lives in a place
sentence: Every inhabitant of the village knew the baker.

definition: An outstanding work of art or skill
sentence: The painting in the museum is a masterpiece.

definition: A flash of lightning with a crash of thunder
sentence: A thunderbolt lit up the dark sky.

definition: Extremely beautiful or impressive
sentence: The castle was magnificent.

definition: A yearly celebration of a past event
sentence: My parents celebrated their wedding anniversary.

definition: Giving physical ease and relaxation
sentence: The chair was very comfortable.

definition: To show how something works
sentence: The teacher will demonstrate the experiment.

definition: The natural world around us
sentence: We must protect the environment from pollution.

definition: In addition to what has been said
sentence: The trip was fun and furthermore it was educational.

definition: The ability to form pictures in the mind
sentence: Her imagination created amazing stories.

definition: A place where goods are bought and sold
sentence: The marketplace was busy with shoppers.

definition: In spite of that; nevertheless
sentence: It rained, but they went hiking nonetheless.

definition: The study of numbers, shapes, and patterns
sentence: Mathematics helps us solve everyday problems.

definition: A book containing information on many subjects
sentence: She looked it up in the encyclopedia.

definition: Recognition of the value of something
sentence: He showed appreciation for his teacher's help.

definition: A condition or fact connected to an event
sentence: Under the circumstance, they decided to wait.

definition: Sad because hopes were not met
sentence: She was disappointed when the game was canceled.

definition: Having strong excitement or interest
sentence: The students were enthusiastic about the field trip.

definition: Freedom from control by others
sentence: The country celebrated its independence day.

definition: Very great in amount or effect
sentence: The support from friends was overwhelming.

definition: Relating to a job that requires special training
sentence: The professional athlete trained every day.

definition: A connection between people or things
sentence: She has a good relationship with her neighbors.

definition: The ability to comprehend something
sentence: Reading helps build understanding of the world.

definition: Very unusual or remarkable
sentence: The magician performed an extraordinary trick.

definition: Something achieved successfully
sentence: Graduating from school is a great accomplishment.

definition: The sharing of information between people
sentence: Good communication helps teams work together.

definition: An act of showing how something works
sentence: The chef gave a cooking demonstration.

definition: A feature or quality of a person or thing
sentence: Kindness is her most admirable characteristic.

definition: Causing overwhelming sadness
sentence: The movie had a heartbreaking ending.

definition: Basic systems needed for a society to function
sentence: Roads and bridges are part of our infrastructure.

definition: A complete change in form or appearance
sentence: The caterpillar's transformation into a butterfly was amazing.

definition: A suggestion about what to do
sentence: The teacher's recommendation helped her choose a good book.

definition: Impossible to forget; very memorable
sentence: The trip to the Grand Canyon was unforgettable.
